text: add this at the end of your nano banana prompts to make your photos more realistic:Image Settings (Apply to Every Shot)Contrast: -7Exposure: +3Particles: 10No AI glow, no smoothing, no cinematic lookiPhone 12 realism only
html:
add this at the end of your nano banana prompts to make your photos more realistic:

Image Settings (Apply to Every Shot)
Contrast: -7
Exposure: +3
Particles: 10
No AI glow, no smoothing, no cinematic look
iPhone 12 realism only

Hiring AI Creators

im looking for people who are good at making AI content or organic content in general. start date is ASAP

we already have multiple creators printing using our systems. looking to add more people to the team

your role is to follow our SOPs and content frameworks to create AI videos and post daily. you'll have full creative direction from us but you need to be able to think creatively and produce content that doesn't look like slop

no automated slop. must be genuinely good

looking to work with you long term if you're good at what you do

dm @mikovct with AI videos you've made. only dm with work you have previously done / accounts you have ran or are running
